---
description: Compact routing rules for Inventory Processing forms.
applyTo: src/auth/**,src/app/**,src/components/app/**,src/stores/auth/**,tests/unit/src/**,docs/forms/**
---

# Inventory Processing Routing Pattern (Compact)

Keep Inventory Processing forms under the Inventory Processing menu group.

If route keys/paths change, update routing, auth helpers, tests, docs, then run npm run build.
